markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content feedback, renewal, and 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal:** Hotel Engine will renew for 6 months, citing strategic uncertainty. A 12-month term is possible if Growth X offers more content for the same price.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Content Accuracy:** Articles require edits for two key product features: Direct Bill (clarify credit approval is not mentioned every time) and FlexPro (correct the refund policy).](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** The focus is on "consumer grade for small business," targeting a specific SMB segment (e.g., 100–500 employees) with a delightful user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**NGINX Content:** A major priority, but content is blocked by a lack of documentation and a complex approval process involving external parties.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** Recent articles (25 reviewed) required more edits than usual.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Specific Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Direct Bill:** The parenthetical "requires credit approval" is overused.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
          - [**Correction:** Credit approval is a one-time requirement, not a constant disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**FlexPro:** The refund policy is misstated.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
          - [**Correction:** Refunds are cash *only* within the hotel's cancellation window; outside it, they are Engine travel credit.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Solution:** Joel will provide a central "source of truth" document for product details to prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Renewal Discussion

  - [**Decision:** Hotel Engine will renew for 6 months, not 12.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Strategic uncertainty around organic's role and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Contingency:** A 12-month term is possible if Growth X offers increased content output for the same price.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The renewal deadline is Feb 3rd. Joel will manage the internal approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### 2026 Strategy & NGINX

  - [**New Strategic Focus:** "Consumer grade for small business."](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Target:** A specific SMB segment (e.g., 100–500 employees) that is underserved by enterprise software.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide a delightful, purpose-built user experience, not just a feature list.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [**NGINX Content Priority:** A major initiative with a goal of 10 posts.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Content creation is blocked by a lack of documentation and a complex approval process involving external parties.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Recycle existing, approved NGINX copy to bypass re-approval.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)

### Performance Update

  - [**Traffic:** Sessions have rebounded from the holiday dip.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Growth by Pillar:**](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Bet 1 (Expense Mgmt):** Policy Enforcement (+56%), Direct Bill (+36%), Receipt Chaos (+236%).](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Bet 2 (Industry-Specific):** Energy & Utilities (+58%), Construction & Infrastructure (+700%), Technology & Software (+275%).](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**FAQs:** A new test is showing early traction and will be monitored.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
      - [Provide a "source of truth" document for product details (Direct Bill, FlexPro).](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Share NGINX details, do's/don'ts, and existing approved copy.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [Share details for the newly launched "Duty of Care" product.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Propose a 12-month renewal package with increased content output.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [Confirm if the 16 articles are new or carryovers.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Conduct a content gap analysis for NGINX competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [Draft questions to clarify 2026 strategic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/joDQzPiA_-72-3zB96ECjiBvWJoako1f?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
